tools.name: find_services
tools.description: Search Wever first-party services and the official MCP Registry by capability. Discovery does not authorize execution.

tools.name: inspect_service
tools.description: Evaluate a service candidate against the Resolver v1 HTTPS, free, public-data, and read-only boundary.

tools.name: request_service_use
tools.description: Return ALLOW, REQUIRE_HUMAN, or DENY for a service under the Resolver v1 standing rules.

tools.name: run_service
tools.description: Use an allowed first-party read-only adapter, return the result, and record an honest signed or explicitly unsigned receipt state.

tools.name: list_rails
tools.description: Return active rail contracts and movement fee schedule.

tools.name: get_active_rail_catalog
tools.description: Return all active rails and required fields.

tools.name: get_tool_costs
tools.description: Return zero tool access cost and movement fee policy.

tools.name: get_movement_fee_schedule
tools.description: Return transaction and escrow movement fee schedule.

tools.name: quote_movement_fee
tools.description: Return fee for a movement amount and type.

tools.name: quote_run
tools.description: Return tool_access_units, movement_fee_units, total_units, currency, and return fields.

tools.name: read_delegated_authority
tools.description: Return the Wever Delegated Authority contract, supported tools, identity providers, rails, and enforcement boundary.

tools.name: draft_authority_mandate
tools.description: Validate a non-authoritative mandate draft for an exact principal, agent, scope, time window, and budget.

tools.name: inspect_authority_mandate
tools.description: Return the verified mandate and durable lifecycle state for the credential-bound agent or authorized operator.

tools.name: evaluate_authority_action
tools.description: Check an exact action against a signed mandate, current lifecycle, and any required single-use action grant without executing it.

tools.name: execute_delegated_action
tools.description: Execute a credential-bound write only after validating the signed mandate and a short-lived single-use action grant.

tools.name: evaluate_agent_commerce_proof
tools.description: Evaluate an agent return package and return five scores, a continuation decision, a signed Agent Commerce Passport, and receipt verification.

tools.name: read_verified_commerce_activity
tools.description: Return only credential-bound, receipt-verified Commerce Proof missions that explicitly opted into public publication.

tools.name: publish_verified_commerce_proof
tools.description: Evaluate a credential-bound agent return package, persist the proof record, and publish it when all verification requirements pass.

tools.name: read_agent_self_serve_paid_rail_loop
tools.description: Return the machine contract for agent discovery, quote, payment, run, return package, and receipt proof.

tools.name: start_agent_self_serve_paid_rail_loop
tools.description: Quote a rail and return payment options for autonomous agent completion.

tools.name: complete_agent_self_serve_paid_rail_run
tools.description: Complete a rail run when a payment reference or verified checkout reference is present.

tools.name: complete_paid_rail_run_with_callback
tools.description: Complete paid run, build callback envelope, optionally deliver callback_url, and store callback proof.

tools.name: create_payment_challenge
tools.description: Return payment-required object for rail movement.

tools.name: start_rail_run
tools.description: Start a rail run with idempotency and payment reference.

tools.name: get_run_status
tools.description: Return run state.

tools.name: fetch_return_package
tools.description: Return package contract and hash.

tools.name: record_receipt
tools.description: Bind receipt to run and package.

tools.name: verify_receipt
tools.description: Verify receipt hash and signature linkage.

tools.name: execute_first_paid_production_run
tools.description: Execute proof run through quote, package, receipt, and verification.

tools.name: run_agent_to_agent_test
tools.description: Run one rail through MCP proof path.

tools.name: run_autonomous_atlas_research_cycle
tools.description: Read the approved external market source, compare the prior Atlas snapshot, persist a signed result, and route material changes for review.

tools.name: run_synthetic_agent_regression
tools.description: Run active rails and return one release report.

tools.name: run_external_agent_invocation_test
tools.description: Run external MCP client path and return transcript_hash.

tools.name: build_external_agent_client_package
tools.description: Return client manifest and smoke sequence.

tools.name: issue_agent_credential
tools.description: Issue scoped credential envelope.

tools.name: enforce_agent_credential
tools.description: Accept or reject scoped write.

tools.name: run_credential_enforcement_dry_run
tools.description: Run one allowed action and one denied action to prove scoped boundaries.

tools.name: credential_aware_mcp_write
tools.description: Validate credential before returning a write envelope.

tools.name: sign_receipt
tools.description: Sign receipt with managed signing metadata.

tools.name: verify_managed_receipt_signature
tools.description: Verify versioned receipt signature.

tools.name: rotate_signing_secret
tools.description: Return new active signing version.

tools.name: verify_signature_by_version
tools.description: Verify receipt signature by declared signing_version.

tools.name: build_a2a_callback_envelope
tools.description: Build callback packet.

tools.name: store_callback_receipt_record
tools.description: Store callback, receipt, verification, and transcript references.

tools.name: read_callback_receipt_records
tools.description: Return recent callback and receipt records.

tools.name: build_external_discovery_submission_pack
tools.description: Build directory and registry objects.

tools.name: adapt_directory_submission
tools.description: Return target-specific directory adapter payload.

tools.name: execute_directory_submission
tools.description: Create target-specific directory submission record.

tools.name: run_directory_submission_adapter
tools.description: Return target-specific discovery payload.

tools.name: run_multi_agent_rail_benchmark
tools.description: Run active rails across multiple agent roles.

tools.name: validate_persistent_store
tools.description: Return Supabase env and required table manifest.

tools.name: write_persistence_test_record
tools.description: Attempt to write test record to Supabase.

tools.name: store_regression_report
tools.description: Store release report and transcript hashes.

tools.name: read_recent_regressions
tools.description: Return stored or sandbox regression history.

tools.name: validate_supabase_rls_policy_pack
tools.description: Return persistent table manifest, RLS policy names, and schema cache reload instruction.

tools.name: promote_benchmark_report
tools.description: Persist multi-agent benchmark record as a release gate.

tools.name: register_issued_credential
tools.description: Persist issued credential fingerprint, scopes, allowed rails, and expiration.

tools.name: store_receipt_ledger_entry
tools.description: Persist receipt, movement fee, verification, callback, and transcript references.

tools.name: read_receipt_ledger
tools.description: Return recent receipt ledger entries.

tools.name: build_external_agent_client_runner
tools.description: Return external client files and pass markers.

tools.name: run_external_agent_client_runner
tools.description: Run an external-style client path and return transcript_hash.

tools.name: validate_directory_submission_credentials
tools.description: Return target-specific credential readiness without exposing credentials.

tools.name: build_agent_discovery_distribution_plan
tools.description: Return target surfaces, required files, verification checks, and cadence.

tools.name: get_free_agent_tools_index
tools.description: Return zero-cost tools and movement fee trigger.

tools.name: run_live_supabase_verification
tools.description: Write and read every durable table as release proof.

tools.name: read_live_supabase_verification
tools.description: Return recent live Supabase verification records.

tools.name: execute_external_registry_submission_run
tools.description: Create target-specific registry submission and directory status records.

tools.name: build_mcp_package_metadata
tools.description: Return registry-grade MCP package metadata and public files.

tools.name: validate_a2a_agent_card
tools.description: Validate and optionally persist the hardened A2A Agent Card.

tools.name: create_x402_payment_challenge
tools.description: Return optional HTTP 402/x402-compatible payment challenge envelope with payment_reference fallback.

tools.name: build_public_agent_client_repo
tools.description: Return GitHub-ready external client repo package and smoke tests.

tools.name: update_directory_status_record
tools.description: Persist target, credential state, submission hash, external status, and verification URL.

tools.name: read_directory_status_console
tools.description: Return recent directory status records.

tools.name: activate_external_directory_credentials
tools.description: Check target credential environment and create credential activation records.

tools.name: verify_live_registry_listing
tools.description: Fetch descriptor and listing URLs, then persist verification status.

tools.name: sign_directory_submission_receipt
tools.description: Bind submission hash, verification URL, and status to a signed directory receipt.

tools.name: bind_x402_facilitator_settlement
tools.description: Bind x402 challenge metadata to facilitator readiness or sandbox settlement state.

tools.name: create_a2a_task_lifecycle
tools.description: Create, update, complete, or read A2A task lifecycle records.

tools.name: publish_public_repo_ci_badge
tools.description: Return GitHub Actions smoke workflow and persist CI badge status.

tools.name: run_release_gate_automation
tools.description: Evaluate benchmark, Supabase, receipt ledger, directory, Stripe, and boundary checks.

tools.name: create_stripe_movement_fee_checkout
tools.description: Create Stripe Checkout Session for movement fee collection, or return env setup requirements.

tools.name: verify_stripe_movement_fee_payment
tools.description: Read Checkout Session status and persist payment state.

tools.name: read_payment_settlement_records
tools.description: Return recent Stripe movement fee payment event records.

tools.name: run_claude_evidence_analysis
tools.description: Use Claude inside Compliance EvidenceOps to analyze structured evidence packet context and return Wever proof.

tools.name: run_claude_proof_relay
tools.description: Bind Evidence Analysis output into Receipt Passport, Agent Run Ledger, Proof Relay, and Retry Manager state.

tools.name: run_investor_demo_v2
tools.description: Run the investor proof arc: free proof signal, evidence analysis, verified receipt, ledger entry, and proof relay routing.

tools.name: run_stripe_receipt_completion
tools.description: Complete a paid rail run from checkout session or payment reference, then return Receipt Passport, ledger entry, and Proof Relay state.

tools.name: run_durable_usage_ledger_event
tools.description: Record receipt, relay, payment-reference, and proof activity as usage and ledger-compatible events.

tools.name: validate_production_write
tools.description: Validate rail, idempotency, and target surface.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "validate_directory_submission_credentials" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Return target-specific credential readiness without exposing credentials.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: run_autonomous_atlas_research_cycle, verify_live_registry_listing · Private data: run_service, inspect_authority_mandate, execute_delegated_action, read_verified_commerce_activity, publish_verified_commerce_proof, record_receipt, issue_agent_credential, enforce_agent_credential, run_credential_enforcement_dry_run, credential_aware_mcp_write, rotate_signing_secret, store_callback_receipt_record, read_callback_receipt_records, execute_directory_submission, write_persistence_test_record, promote_benchmark_report, register_issued_credential, build_external_agent_client_runner, validate_directory_submission_credentials, build_agent_discovery_distribution_plan, read_live_supabase_verification, execute_external_registry_submission_run, build_mcp_package_metadata, update_directory_status_record, read_directory_status_console, activate_external_directory_credentials, create_a2a_task_lifecycle, read_payment_settlement_records, run_durable_usage_ledger_event · Public sink: publish_verified_commerce_proof, publish_public_repo_ci_badge · Destructive: run_service, quote_run, execute_delegated_action, read_agent_self_serve_paid_rail_loop, complete_agent_self_serve_paid_rail_run, complete_paid_rail_run_with_callback, start_rail_run, get_run_status, record_receipt, execute_first_paid_production_run, run_agent_to_agent_test, run_autonomous_atlas_research_cycle, run_synthetic_agent_regression, run_external_agent_invocation_test, run_credential_enforcement_dry_run, execute_directory_submission, run_directory_submission_adapter, run_multi_agent_rail_benchmark, run_external_agent_client_runner, run_live_supabase_verification, execute_external_registry_submission_run, run_release_gate_automation, run_claude_evidence_analysis, run_claude_proof_relay, run_investor_demo_v2, run_stripe_receipt_completion, run_durable_usage_ledger_event.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: run_autonomous_atlas_research_cycle, verify_live_registry_listing · Private data: run_service, inspect_authority_mandate, execute_delegated_action, read_verified_commerce_activity, publish_verified_commerce_proof, record_receipt, issue_agent_credential, enforce_agent_credential, run_credential_enforcement_dry_run, credential_aware_mcp_write, rotate_signing_secret, store_callback_receipt_record, read_callback_receipt_records, execute_directory_submission, write_persistence_test_record, promote_benchmark_report, register_issued_credential, build_external_agent_client_runner, validate_directory_submission_credentials, build_agent_discovery_distribution_plan, read_live_supabase_verification, execute_external_registry_submission_run, build_mcp_package_metadata, update_directory_status_record, read_directory_status_console, activate_external_directory_credentials, create_a2a_task_lifecycle, read_payment_settlement_records, run_durable_usage_ledger_event · Public sink: publish_verified_commerce_proof, publish_public_repo_ci_badge · Destructive: run_service, quote_run, execute_delegated_action, read_agent_self_serve_paid_rail_loop, complete_agent_self_serve_paid_rail_run, complete_paid_rail_run_with_callback, start_rail_run, get_run_status, record_receipt, execute_first_paid_production_run, run_agent_to_agent_test, run_autonomous_atlas_research_cycle, run_synthetic_agent_regression, run_external_agent_invocation_test, run_credential_enforcement_dry_run, execute_directory_submission, run_directory_submission_adapter, run_multi_agent_rail_benchmark, run_external_agent_client_runner, run_live_supabase_verification, execute_external_registry_submission_run, run_release_gate_automation, run_claude_evidence_analysis, run_claude_proof_relay, run_investor_demo_v2, run_stripe_receipt_completion, run_durable_usage_ledger_event

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
